_comment: Master settings file for Project Majdal pipeline. Edit these values before running the notebook.

scale_defaults._comment: Default values applied to every scale when the field is missing from the source JSON. Edit these to match your population and environment.

phase_01_behavioral_domains._comment: Behavioral domain generation. LEVEL = likelihood of occurrence in target environment, not item difficulty.

min_examples_per_construct.description: Minimum behavioral examples required per construct before a warning is raised

human_review_columns.human_review_pass: Boolean. Default True. Set False in Excel to exclude an example before Phase 2.
human_review_columns.human_comments: Free text. Reason for any override.

construct_validity.description: LLM must judge the example as genuinely reflecting the target construct

face_validity.description: LLM must judge the example as appearing relevant to target respondents

discriminant_validity.description: LLM must judge the example as distinct from excluded constructs

min_valid_examples_per_scale.description: Minimum valid examples per scale after validation; below this raises a warning

human_review_columns.human_review_pass: Boolean. Default True. Overrides system process_flag. Phase 3 reads this column.
human_review_columns.human_comments: Free text. Especially useful when validation_issues is populated.

phase_03_item_generation._comment: Stratified item generation from validated behavioral examples

duplicate_removal.description: Near-duplicate items (cosine similarity >= threshold) are removed

max_word_count.description: Items exceeding this word count are flagged for review

no_negations.description: Items containing negation patterns are flagged (I don't / I never / I am not)

human_review_columns.human_review_pass: Boolean. Default True. Set False to exclude an item before readability analysis. Phase 4 reads this column.
human_review_columns.human_comments: Free text. Notes on obvious construct contamination or generation failure.

readability_hard_cap.description: Items still above reading_level_hard_cap after all simplification attempts are flagged system_readability_pass=False

readability_soft_target.description: Items above reading_level_target (but below hard cap) are flagged above_reading_target=True for human review

bias_flag.description: Items matching bias patterns are flagged in bias_flags — not auto-excluded; human review required

human_review_columns.system_readability_pass: System-set Boolean. False only if item remains above hard cap after all simplification attempts.
human_review_columns.human_review_pass: Boolean. Default True. Override system result. Phase 5 reads this column.
human_review_columns.human_comments: Free text. Required for any accepted bias-flagged item.

agreement_metrics.scale_mapping_agreement: proportion of SMEs whose mapped scale matches the intended/target scale
agreement_metrics.cv_majority_agreement: proportion of SMEs who agreed with the majority vote (diagnostic only)
agreement_metrics.mean_target_rating: average target-scale fit rating across all SMEs

human_review_columns.cv_pass: System-set Boolean. True if both min_mean_target_rating and min_scale_mapping_agreement thresholds are met.
human_review_columns.human_review_pass: Boolean. Default True. Overrides cv_pass. Phase 6 reads this column.
human_review_columns.human_comments: Free text. Especially useful when cv_maps_to_target=False or rating is 6-7.

phase_06_pseudo_factor_analysis._comment: Semantic PFA using sentence transformers as a proxy for item correlations

reversal_detection._comment: LLM used to detect and rewrite semantically low-pole items before embedding. Temperature 0 for deterministic judgements. Only called for items that first match avoidance language patterns — most items skip the LLM call entirely.

model_fit_thresholds._comment: RMSR is the only reliable fit metric for PFA (no sample size). See Suarez-Alvarez et al. (2026).

discriminant_validity._comment: ratio: target loading / max cross-loading must exceed threshold. ceiling: absolute max cross-loading regardless of ratio (soft flag). Both configurable.

human_review_columns.human_review_pass: Boolean. Default True. Overrides pfa_pass_level. Phase 7 reads this column.
human_review_columns.human_comments: Free text. Especially important for DAAL failures and discriminant flags.

phase_07_item_pool_assembly._comment: Final item pool after all automated phases. Input to human review.

human_review_columns.human_notes: Free text. Rationale, suggested rewording, or regeneration flags.
